title: MotionFlow
description: Make Minecraft movement look smoother, especially in recorded footage.
body:
MotionFlow 是一个专注于动态模糊（Motion Blur）效果的轻量 Minecraft 光影包。

它不会改变游戏原本的整体光照、色彩风格或阴影表现，而是专门通过运动模糊来提升玩家在奔跑、移动、转头和快速视角变化时的视觉流畅感。

这个光影尤其适合用于录制视频。在部分 AMD 显卡或采集环境下，Minecraft 实际游玩时可能已经很流畅，但录制出来的画面在运动过程中仍然会显得不够顺滑。MotionFlow 可以很好地缓解这种观感问题，让成片看起来更自然、更连贯，也更有速度感。

## 特点
- 仅专注于动态模糊效果
- 不追求改变原版光照风格
- 提升运动时的主观流畅感
- 特别适合录制视频时使用
- 轻量、直接、开箱即用
## 兼容性
- 当前版本支持 Iris
- 安装并启用后即可使用
## 注意
MotionFlow 提升的是视觉上的运动流畅感，而不是实际 FPS。

---

MotionFlow is a lightweight Minecraft shaderpack focused entirely on motion blur.

Instead of changing the game’s lighting, colors, or shadow style, it is designed specifically to improve the visual smoothness of movement, sprinting, camera turns, and fast motion.

This shaderpack is especially useful for video recording. On some AMD GPU setups or capture workflows, Minecraft may feel smooth while playing, but recorded footage can still appear less fluid during motion. MotionFlow helps reduce that issue, making the final video look smoother, more natural, and more cohesive.

## Features
1. Focused purely on motion blur
1. Does not aim to overhaul the vanilla lighting style
1. Improves perceived smoothness during movement
1. Especially useful for recording gameplay footage
1. Lightweight and easy to use
## Compatibility
- Currently supports Iris
- Just install Iris and enable the shaderpack
## Note
MotionFlow improves perceived motion smoothness, not actual FPS.
